description: Add a notification center with unread state and filtering.

userStories.title: Persisting notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored so that it persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Read and unread state is stored for each notification.
State survives reloads and new sessions.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Updating notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what still needs attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications can be marked read and unread.
State changes persist for the selected notification.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Showing notification badge and list
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list so that I can see what needs attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread badge reflects the count of unread notifications.
Notification list opens and shows stored notifications.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filtering notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread work.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter options include all, unread, and read.
Changing the filter updates visible notifications without altering stored state.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clearing read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that the list stays focused on active items.
acceptanceCriteria: Clearing read notifications removes only read items.
Unread notifications remain after the action completes.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
